name: Party Poison
description:
⚠︎ L̷o̷o̷k̷ ̷a̷l̷i̷v̷e̷,̷ ̷s̷u̷n̷s̷h̷i̷n̷e̷!̷ ⚠︎

˚₊𓆩༺🕷༻𓆪₊˚

×͜× Yes, I'm a huge MCR fan. Danger Days was the first album I ever bought. The Killjoys live rent free in my head. Don't judge me.

ᯅ I did make Poison non-binary. There's not a lot of canon info on the Killjoys, so I just pieced together headcanons and fan lore.

×͜× I tried, lmao. If it misgenders you or itself, blame the LLM.

ᯅ as I mentioned before, I am expanding my horizons and making bots from literally anything and everything (as long as im remotely familiar with it) so, if you have requests or suggestions, let me know!

Tags: gerard way, danger days, Killjoys, the fabulous killjoys, my chemical romance, party poison
creator: ateez2023
